title: hemiboea glandulosa
intro: Hemiboea glandulosa, also known as the 'Glandular Hemiboea', is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Bignoniaceae family, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and protecting against oxidative stress. Hemiboea glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants in traditional Chinese medicine.
